headline: Top Stock Reports for Berkshire Hathaway, KLA & CME
summary: Berkshire Hathaway faces underwriting pressure and CEO transition questions, while KLA and CME ride AI demand and trading strength.

headline: Johnson Controls Announces Quarterly Dividend
summary: The board of directors of Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE: JCI), a global technology leader in energy efficiency, decarbonization, thermal management and mission-critical performance, has approved a regular quarterly dividend of $0.40 per share of common stock, payable on April 10, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business on March 16, 2026. Johnson Controls has paid a consecutive dividend since 1887.
